name: Knights Turkey Jerky 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a marinade dish.
2. Add strips of turkey or beef into the marinade.
3. Marinate for 8-24 hours, depending on how often you shake the mixture and how flavorful you want it to be.
4. Remove strips from the marinade and lightly dampen with a towel to remove excess liquid.
5. Place in dehydrator or on sheets for oven.
6. Dehydrate until jerky is tough/crisp. Time varies based on dehydration method; use your best judgement (12-36 hours).
7. Add extra Tabasco for more spicy flavor, if desired.
